name: Feature request

## Problem

What's the underlying need? Who hits it and when?

## Proposal

What you'd like to see.

## Fit

Which goal or requirement does this serve (see docs/prd.md — e.g. FR-004, NFR-002)? Does it add agent capability or UI chrome? (The project rations chrome hard.)

## Alternatives

Anything you considered and rejected.
